可爱藤妖乖巧讨喜尹知知
腹黑系统千层套路百里小叁
一妖一统会碰撞出怎样的火花呢？《快穿系统，偏执男主逐渐不对劲》入股不亏！！
在这秋意渐浓之初，相约一起见证叁爷和知知的幸福！
纸伞为契，你我定约！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631364969,"group_id":"7003301440626101260","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只此风华正少年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ST2UtpGcsAuF35wtQgiV216vYsw+UR3DTi4HrkOgpq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ec18dde9d3e42d4a0f3987fecccb2e2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702848&x-signature=TObQyR28H1WX7zcluTGTV1tZPt4%3D","user_id":"1003217279260094","user_name":"小熊要买雨衣嘛？"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1003217279260094","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1728843545,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7003301440626101260","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿#1v1#系统vs宿主#五大系统系列小三篇】
一场森林大火藤妖尹知知以为自己要灰飞烟灭了，结果意外绑定了一个‘攻略男主系统’。
系统脾气古怪，系统声音好听，系统对她很好。
开始：系统叫她攻略男主，加油！
后来：系统叫她攻略的时候要多多上手，牵手，抱抱，扑倒，搞快点！
尹知知：？？？
为什么感觉系统比她还更着急攻略男主的进度？
为什么世界男主在的时候系统就死机？！
